## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Jason, Edin, Bianca, and Joe to discuss ongoing projects, marketing initiatives, and operational updates for GrowthX and The Output.](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Newsletter launch for The Output is scheduled for tomorrow, with final copy approval needed from Jason](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Social media strategy for The Output is in progress, focusing on YouTube, TikTok, and potentially other platforms](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [HubSpot migration and deal structure setup is 80% complete, enabling better tracking of events, contacts, and ARR](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Outbound email campaign is ready to launch, pending Jason's approval on copy and contact selection](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)

## Topics

### Newsletter and Website Updates

  - [Ed completed changes for town.com website](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [GrowthX newsletter template is in progress by Markham](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [The Output newsletter template reviewed; minor adjustments needed (byline, issue number, date)](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Website updates for The Output are mostly complete, with some refinements needed for grid layout and dark/light mode](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)

### Social Media Strategy

  - [Current focus on YouTube and TikTok for The Output](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Need to continue clipping content from existing video (only 3 clips done so far)](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=3152.0)
  - [Considering boosting posts to gain initial subscribers (2-3k) for legitimacy](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=3296.0)
  - [Plan to aim for monthly or bi-weekly new episode releases](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=3219.0)

### HubSpot Migration and Deal Structure

  - [Joe has made significant progress on porting over deals and setting up the system](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Event tracking is 80% complete, with some manual input needed for in-person events](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=3901.0)
  - [New deal structure allows for tracking of strategy sprints and associated growth deals](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=4411.0)
  - [Custom API and Zapier integration being built for audience ingestion (80% complete)](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=4179.0)

### Outbound Email Campaign

  - [Marilia has updated the copy and is waiting for Jason's approval](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=3720.0)
  - [Joe will update sequences in HubSpot once copy is approved](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=3851.0)
  - [Marilia needs to research and select contacts from the provided list (34-35 people) in Adio](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=4080.0)

### Upcoming Travel and Schedules

  - [Jason is traveling to Shanghai for a week, leaving this week](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=3524.0)
  - [Joe is traveling to Miami on Thursday for a family celebration](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=3574.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to review and approve newsletter copy for The Output launch](https://fathom.video/share/3CzyEFitjhVE6zGrX5vPjaPHzdEfSqRT?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
